_meta.name: lisbon-day-2-pose-raise
_meta.description: Day 2 install state, 6/5/2026. Camera mounted at ceiling, ~30deg downward. yolo11s-pose model (n-pose could not see upper-body keypoints at this angle). pose_raise movement source — wrist-above-elbow postural cue. Threshold 0.05 = any visible raise fires. CV7 hold 200ms across momentary keypoint dips. Scene movement = max across tracks so phantom detections do not dilute real gestures.
_meta.movement_source_choice: pose_raise — direct wrist_y < elbow_y comparison. View-stable at our ceiling-down angle once keypoint quality was fixed by switching from yolo11n to yolo11s.
supporting_fixes: PR #62 wrist-elevation + EMA infrastructure (knobs available, source not currently used)
PR #63 mode 1 all white + mode 2 pure red
